name: Acorn ADFS
description: ADFS (Advanced Disc Filing System) is a floppy disc and SCSI hard disc filing system for the BBC Micro. It supports hierarchical directories, random access files, and the Acorn free space map format. ADFS plugs into the MOS filing system framework, providing implementations of OSFILE, OSFIND, OSGBPB, OSBGET, OSBPUT, and OSARGS. It also handles disc formatting, defect mapping, and file compaction. The ROM contains both the floppy disc driver (using the WD1770 controller) and the SCSI hard disc driver.

references.label: Acorn ADFS User Guide (PDF)
references.note: Official Acorn user guide covering ADFS commands, disc formatting, and file operations.

references.label: Acorn Winchester Disc 110/130 Service Manual (PDF)
references.note: Service manual for the Acorn Winchester drive enclosure, covering the Host Adapter PCB, SCSI interface, and 1 MHz bus connection.

references.label: Adaptec ACB-4000 Series User's Manual (PDF)
references.note: User manual for the Adaptec ACB-4000 SCSI-to-ST-412 disc controller used in Acorn Winchester drives.

references.label: Adaptec ACB-4000 OEM Manual (PDF)
references.note: OEM technical manual for the ACB-4000 with SCSI command details and LUN-to-drive-select mapping.

references.label: Acorn SCSI Host Adapter Schematic
references.note: Circuit diagram of the Host Adapter PCB that bridges the 1 MHz bus to the SCSI interface at &FC40-&FC43.

references.label: Hoglet's ADFS 1.30 disassembly
references.note: A BeebAsm-syntax disassembly that reassembles to byte-identical ROMs for multiple ADFS variants. Provided important structural guidance.

references.label: Dominic Beesley's ADFS multi-target reassembly
references.note: A ca65-based multi-target reassembly covering many ADFS versions with well-named labels and modular driver separation.

references.label: J.G. Harston's ADFS 1.30 disassembly
references.note: A BBC BASIC-embedded disassembly with informative block comments and entry/exit documentation for key routines.

references.label: Stardot Forums: A new annotated disassembly of Acorn ADFS
references.note: Discussion thread for the ADFS disassemblies.

references.label: Stardot forum thread on ADFS internals
references.note: Stardot forum thread discussing ADFS internals with technical details on SCSI protocol, workspace layout, and retry mechanisms.
